title: The Frog Who Would A Wooing Go
content:
A Frog he would a-wooing go,
    Whether his mother would let him or no.

    Off he set with his opera-hat.
    On the road he met with a Rat.

title: The Nine Lives Of A Cat - A Tale Of Wonder
content:
Preface


    This tale of wonder is told for children; with which view, it has been carefully designed and very nicely printed.

    For some time
